channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « Votre Xbox Series a une date d’expiration » : un internaute accuse-t-il Microsoft d’obsolescence programmée ?
item.description: Révélant un détail technique qui condamnerait les consoles Xbox Series S et X à plus ou moins long terme, un internaute affirme que c'est un choix délibéré de Microsoft.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom traduit les sous-titres de la TV en direct grâce à l’IA : une première en France
item.description: Bouygues Telecom teste la traduction des sous-titres TV en direct par IA sur son décodeur b.tv : 5 langues disponibles, traitement local sans cloud. Une première en France, encore en phase de test.

item.title: UK regulator mandates that Google should let publishers opt out of AI search
item.description: Britain's CMA has imposed new requirements on Google's AI search business – publishers can opt out of appearing in AI results.

item.title: Asus dévoile le premier routeur Wi-Fi 8 et son débit hallucinant
item.description: Asus devient le premier constructeur à révéler un routeur adapté à la norme Wi-Fi 8, dont la certification finale est encore loin. Mais ça n'empêche pas de préparer le terrain.

item.title: Best peripherals of Computex 2026: top new keyboards and mice you need to know about
item.description: Computex 2026 has seen a wealth of hardware manufacturers pushing the envelope when it comes to new mice and keyboards. Here are some of our favorites we've spotted throughout the event so far.

item.title: Microsoft Edge and Aloha caught sharing precise user location data with third parties
item.description: A shocking new report shows that 8 out of 15 popular mobile browsers harvest your location data, with Microsoft Edge and Aloha sharing precise tracking details with third parties. Here is how to keep your daily routine private.

item.title: Weedhack malware campaign infects 116,000 mod-hungry Minecraft players systems through SEO poisoning and YouTube
item.description: Fake mods and clients are being advertised on YouTube and used to deploy backdoors and infostealers.

item.title: Pokémon Champions hits iOS and Android on June 17
item.description: In a few short weeks, Pokémon Champions will arrive on mobile with full cross-platform support.

item.title: Summer Game Fest
item.description: All TechRadar stories about the biggest gaming event of the year

item.title: This $67 early Prime Day standing desk deal is perfect for smaller home offices — I'm a professional office furniture reviewer and this budget pick ticks all the boxes for compact workspaces
item.description: Devaise's 40-inch standing desk is ideal for smaller spaces.

item.title: TikTok launches TikTok Pro Events, an app for cultural moments like the FIFA World Cup
item.description: The app allows users to engage with other fans, explore trending videos, and access curated creator feeds.

item.title: MacBook Neo : Apple a créé un monstre de ventes à 699 euros et ne peut plus suivre la demande
item.description: Apple a expédié 1,1 million de MacBook Neo en trois semaines. Ruptures de stock en France, production doublée, concurrence Windows réveillée : le petit Mac bouscule tout le marché.

item.title: Microsoft and OpenAI broke up — now they’re ready to fight
item.description: At Microsoft's annual Build conference on Tuesday, the company announced a slew of new or expanded AI initiatives, including a super app, in-house reasoning models, a cybersecurity tool, and OpenClaw-esque AI agents. All this news added up to a clear message: Microsoft is positioned to be one of the biggest players in AI, and it's […]

item.title: Adorama's 'Summer Sony Sale' drops the A7R V and A7R IV cameras to a record-low price — these still-great bodies are much cheaper than the A7R VI
item.description: Got your eye on the new A7R VI, but it's a little too pricey? You could consider the slightly older A7R IV and A7R V with these record-low prices.

item.title: The worst hacks and breaches of 2026 (so far)
item.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

item.title: Cette batterie externe magnétique Ugreen (Qi2 25W) qui peut recharger trois appareils s’allège de 30 €
item.description: Compatible avec la charge sans fil Qi2 jusqu'à 25 W, permettant une recharge rapide des iPhone récents, la batterie externe magnétique Ugreen MagFlow 3-en-1 est un produit complet, que l'on trouve à 59,99 euros au lieu de 89,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Meet Wander, a StumbleUpon-inspired tool for discovering the ‘small web’
item.description: This open-source community project lets you create a StumbleUpon-like experience for recommending your favorite sites.

item.title: 8 Googlebooks d’un coup : Google veut noyer le MacBook
item.description: Google n'attaque pas le PC portable timidement : au moins huit Googlebooks seraient déjà dans les cartons pour cet automne. De quoi inonder les rayons d'un coup.

item.title: 'We don't want to make a legacy AVR': WiiM's first soundbar is the same price as the Sonos Beam, but it's bigger, beefier and has real upfiring drivers for Dolby Atmos — and we talked to WiiM's CEO about it
item.description: WiiM's first soundbar is a 3.0.2 system that can be expanded to 5.1.2 —and possibly more.

item.title: WiiM's first soundbar has a touchscreen display and Dolby Atmos
item.description: WiiM, a company known for its lineup of speakers and amplifiers, has revealed its first soundbar.

item.title: The best laptops of Computex 2026: top machines from Dell, MSI, Acer, and even Microsoft!
item.description: I've been checking out all the new laptops at Computex 2026 from Asus, Acer, Dell, MSI, and many, many more. Here are my picks for the best laptops.

item.title: I asked ChatGPT to think like a kid — and it suddenly saw every hole in my ideas
item.description: Asking ChatGPT to think like a curious child can be an unexpectedly effective way to spot gaps in logic.

item.title: Transpiration, température, respiration… les compteurs vélo Wahoo pourront désormais analyser bien plus de données
item.description: Wahoo a annoncé une compatibilité avec davantage de capteurs pour ses compteurs vélo. De quoi assurer une connexion avec les appareils de Core, Flowbio, hDrop et Tymewear.

item.title: AI promised productivity but IT teams got cognitive overload instead
item.description: AI cognitive overload is real — fragmented security tools are pushing already stretched IT teams further.

item.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
item.description: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta agents to "run your whole business"
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg wants agents to be able to "run your whole business."

item.title: 3 smartphones qui nous ont tapé dans l’oeil en juin 2026
item.description: Voici notre sélection des meilleurs smartphones testés par les journalistes de 01net ces dernières semaines.

item.title: Until Dawn 2 announced, but it's by a new developer — either way, I'm still excited for more slasher horror
item.description: A sequel to Until Dawn has been announced, but the successor to the 2015 horror game isn't being developed by Supermassive Games.

item.title: Claude AI: What's free in 2026 and what isn't?
item.description: Making sense of what you get from Claude AI at the free tier, especially as limits are vague and keep shifting.

item.title: Price pressures in building PCs 'aren't going away anytime soon' warns AMD exec — but new budget CPU could be in the works
item.description: 'We know the pressures that are there in building systems aren't going away anytime soon': AMD exec hints at possible relief with new budget Ryzen CPU.

item.title: A first look at Microsoft’s Surface Laptop Ultra and Surface Dev Box
item.description: Microsoft has two new Surface devices arriving later this year, both powered by Nvidia's RTX Spark chips. I got a chance to take a closer look at both the Surface Laptop Ultra and Surface RTX Spark Dev Box at Microsoft's Build conference this week, and while both have the same chip inside, they're utilizing Nvidia's […]

item.title: DJI Osmo Pocket 4 : la caméra de poche qui vise le haut de gamme du vlog atteint les -100 € avec cette promo
item.description: La DJI Osmo Pocket 4 est le dernier modèle de caméra de poche en date de la marque, disponible à 499 euros mais qui passe à 398,56 euros grâce à un code sur AliExpress.

item.title: Comment savoir quelle version de Windows est installée sur son PC ?
item.description: Windows se décline désormais en de nombreuses versions, avec une mise à jour majeure par an. Pour garder la trace des mises à jour, vérifier la compatibilité d'un logiciel ou signaler un quelconque problème, il est toujours intéressant de pouvoir renseigner la version de Windows installée sur son ordinateur. Voici comment la trouver.

item.title: Google’s AI Overviews search feature will be impacted by a ‘world first’ rule in the UK. Here’s what will change
item.description: Online publishers ‘will now have effective tools to prevent their content being used to power AI features in search,’ says the UK’s competition regulator. AI-generated summaries in Google search results take content from online publishers while reducing traffic to their websites—a tricky relationship that has been seemingly inevitable until now.

item.title: Warren Buffett explained that the greatest measure of success at the end of your life comes down to 1 word
item.description: Ever wonder what truly matters most when you look back at your life? Warren Buffett has the answer. We’ve been sold a narrow definition of success for a long time. Revenue targets, market share, titles, corner offices. Leaders climb the ladder, hit the numbers, and still feel like something’s missing. That’s because most of what we measure at work has very little to do with what actually matters in life....

item.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
item.description: The Series F round values Coralogix at $1.6 billion and comes less than a year after its previous raise.

item.title: BYD explose ses records et prépare une citadine hybride rechargeable à 24 000 € pour terrasser les Clio et 208 !
item.description: Après une période de baisse inquiétante, BYD inverse la vapeur en signant un nouveau record de ventes à l’étranger. Le constructeur chinois a en effet livré plus de 160 000 voitures au mois de mai, soit une hausse de 80 % par rapport à mai 2025.

item.title: Plex adds new social features ahead of a major price hike for its lifetime pass
item.description: Plex has come a long way from being just a personal media server. Over the past few years, it has transformed into a streaming hub, today featuring ad-supported content and movie rental options. Now, the company is setting its sights on competing with social networking platforms like Reddit and Letterboxd: on Wednesday, Plex unveiled several […]

item.title: 'It instantly gives you a smile, because you know the track'— Rayman Legends Retold audio director breaks down iconic music levels
item.description: Ubisoft's Charlie Atanasyan speaks Rayman Legends Retold's iconic music levels and how to keep voice acting from being annoying

item.title: America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders season 3 drops first emotional Netflix trailer — and fans are convinced that this veteran is retiring early after getting 'too much screentime'
item.description: America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders season 3 is ours in a matter of weeks — but does 'too much screentime' in new Netflix trailer mean one veteran is stepping away?

item.title: Widow's Bay episode 8's big chase sequence only took two nights to film — but the Apple TV show's breakout star says it was so intense that she 'ended up losing my voice'
item.description: The Apple TV show's breakout star breaks down the most "physically exhausting" moment of her career so far.

item.title: The best Bukayo Saka documentary is also a WhatsApp ad
item.description: The Meta-owned app chronicles the Arsenal star’s career in a new film, and proves that brand entertainment isn’t an oxymoron. Bukayo Saka is having an epic year. In just this past month, the English soccer star led Arsenal to its first Premier League title in more than 20 years, then played in a UEFA Champions League final (where the team lost to Paris Saint-Germain on penalties). Next, he’ll lead England into the 2026 FIFA World Cup....

item.title: Future-proof your PC for under $90 — Thermaltake's Toughpower PF3 PSU lets you power today's PC hardware and tomorrow's upgrades with this limited-time deal at Newegg
item.description: Thermaltake's Toughpower PF3 1050W PSU with ATX 3.0 support and Platinum efficiency gets a huge price cut.
